title: The Wrench of Jerry
description: Yet another create modpack...but kinda lightweight! (Not Anymore lol)
body:
# The Wrench of Jerry
Yet another [Create](/mod/create-fabric) modpack, with plenty of QoL mods. Designed for use on creative servers, The Wrench of Jerry offers performance and optimization mods along with several Create add-ons to suit your creative build needs. This modpack is based on [Simply Optimized](/modpack/sop) for optimization. The goal of this modpack was to not be like some modpacks that have hundreds of mods, having around 70 (which is still a lot but still not *that* bad)

## Mods
- Create
  - Several Create addons, including Steam and Rails, Deco, Railways Navigator, New Age, and more.
- Xaero's Minimap & World Map
- Simple Voice Chat
- Sodium
- WorldEdit
- Axiom
- Chipped
- UI & Aesthetic mods including Blur+ and Smooth Scrolling (Cuz they look nice and don't take up much performance)
- Optimization mods

# Server Use
Modifications to this modpack may be necessary to ensure an optimal experience.
